scripts.lint: biome check README.md BUILD.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml playwright.config.ts biome.json tsconfig.base.json .env.example && pnpm -r lint
scripts.format: biome format --write README.md BUILD.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml playwright.config.ts biome.json tsconfig.base.json .env.example && pnpm -r format
scripts.check: biome check README.md BUILD.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml playwright.config.ts biome.json tsconfig.base.json .env.example && pnpm -r check
